project_area: Home rehabilitation for major systems (mechanical, heating, roof, siding, windows), code compliance, or accessibility features
demographic_requirements: Owner must be at least 62 years of age, meet low to moderate income limits, and agree to a five-year owner-occupied restriction. For multi-unit properties, at least 51% of the building must meet income limits.
eligibility_summary: Open to income-eligible seniors aged 62+ who own their home in Worcester, MA. Must provide income documentation and meet HUD income limits. Multi-unit properties require 51% of units to meet income limits, with tenants also providing income documentation.
